In [21]:
scenario_compare = (
    All_Results[All_Results["Model"].isin(["Mean_CVaR", "Risk_Parity", "Robust_CVaR_Conservative_Proxy", "Markowitz_Mean_Variance"])]
    .groupby(["Scenario", "Model"], as_index=False)[["Expected_Return", "Volatility", "CVaR_95", "HHI", "Turnover"]]
    .mean()
)
fig = px.bar(
    scenario_compare,
    x="Scenario",
    y="Expected_Return",
    color="Model",
    barmode="group",
    title="Comparaison finale des 4 scénarios",
)
fig.update_yaxes(tickformat=".0%")
show_and_export_fig(fig, "12_comparaison_finale_4_scenarios", "Comparaison finale des 4 scénarios")
display_graph_comment(
    "La figure compare les rendements attendus des modèles clés dans les quatre scénarios.",
    "`Historical_Raw` peut produire des rendements plus élevés car il extrapole le passé ; il reste donc séparé de la recommandation.",
    "`APT_Central` est conservé comme scénario de décision principal.",
)

À retenir. La figure compare les rendements attendus des modèles clés dans les quatre scénarios. Historical_Raw peut produire des rendements plus élevés car il extrapole le passé ; il reste donc séparé de la recommandation. APT_Central est conservé comme scénario de décision principal.

Allocation additionnelle de 10 MD dans la poche optimisable¶

Cette section intègre l'allocation additionnelle directement dans le notebook 02. L'ajout de 10 MD est optimisé sur les quatre scénarios de rendement attendu, sans liquidation des positions existantes. APT_Central reste la référence principale et Historical_Raw reste comparatif.

Objectif ROE = TSR + 4 %¶

L'objectif demandé est ROE = TSR + 4 %. Dans cette analyse, il est approché par une cible de rendement financier attendu, car le notebook ne modélise pas le résultat net comptable ni les fonds propres.

Objectif, cadrage et formulation¶

L'ajout de 10 MD est traité comme un problème d'allocation additionnelle. La variable de décision est u_i, le poids du budget additionnel investi dans l'actif i.

sum(u_i) = 1, u_i >= 0, A_i = ADDITIONAL_BUDGET * u_i, V_i_new = V_i_current + A_i, V_opt_new = V_opt_current + ADDITIONAL_BUDGET, w_i_new = V_i_new / V_opt_new.

Les métriques sont calculées sur le portefeuille final w_new, et pas uniquement sur u.

In [22]:
ADDITIONAL_BUDGET = 10_000_000.0
ADD10MD_FIGURES_DIR = FIGURES_DIR / "additional_10md"
ADD10MD_FIGURES_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
for _old in ADD10MD_FIGURES_DIR.glob("*.html"):
    _old.unlink()

try:
    _summary03 = pd.read_excel(PROJECT_DIR / "data" / "exports" / "diagnostic_pre_optimisation_2025.xlsx", sheet_name="Portfolio_Summary").iloc[0]
    V_TOTAL_CURRENT = float(_summary03["total_portfolio_value"])
    V_OPT_CURRENT = float(_summary03["optimisable_value"])
    V_FIXED_CURRENT = float(_summary03["non_optimisable_value"])
except Exception:
    V_OPT_CURRENT = float(universe["current_value"].sum())
    V_TOTAL_CURRENT = V_OPT_CURRENT
    V_FIXED_CURRENT = 0.0

V_OPT_FINAL = V_OPT_CURRENT + ADDITIONAL_BUDGET
V_TOTAL_FINAL = V_TOTAL_CURRENT + ADDITIONAL_BUDGET
R_FIXED_ASSUMPTION = 0.0
ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4 = float(rf_annual) + 0.04
current_values_add10 = universe.set_index("asset_id")["current_value"].astype(float).reindex(asset_ids)
current_weights_add10 = current_values_add10 / V_OPT_CURRENT

assert abs(V_TOTAL_CURRENT - V_OPT_CURRENT - V_FIXED_CURRENT) <= 1e-2
assert abs(V_OPT_FINAL - V_OPT_CURRENT - ADDITIONAL_BUDGET) <= 1e-8
assert abs(V_TOTAL_FINAL - V_TOTAL_CURRENT - ADDITIONAL_BUDGET) <= 1e-8

Add10MD_Hypotheses = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Indicateur": "V_TOTAL_CURRENT", "Valeur": V_TOTAL_CURRENT, "Commentaire": "Portefeuille total actuel"},
    {"Indicateur": "V_OPT_CURRENT", "Valeur": V_OPT_CURRENT, "Commentaire": "Poche optimisable actuelle"},
    {"Indicateur": "V_FIXED_CURRENT", "Valeur": V_FIXED_CURRENT, "Commentaire": "Poche non optimisable figée"},
    {"Indicateur": "ADDITIONAL_BUDGET", "Valeur": ADDITIONAL_BUDGET, "Commentaire": "Investi uniquement dans la poche optimisable"},
    {"Indicateur": "V_OPT_FINAL", "Valeur": V_OPT_FINAL, "Commentaire": "V_OPT_CURRENT + ADDITIONAL_BUDGET"},
    {"Indicateur": "V_TOTAL_FINAL", "Valeur": V_TOTAL_FINAL, "Commentaire": "V_TOTAL_CURRENT + ADDITIONAL_BUDGET"},
    {"Indicateur": "ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4", "Valeur": ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4, "Commentaire": "Objectif demandé : ROE = TSR + 4 %, approximé par une cible de rendement financier attendu"},
])
display(Add10MD_Hypotheses)

fig = px.bar(
    pd.DataFrame({"Composante": ["Poche optimisable actuelle", "Poche non optimisable", "Ajout 10 MD"], "Montant_DT": [V_OPT_CURRENT, V_FIXED_CURRENT, ADDITIONAL_BUDGET]}),
    x="Composante", y="Montant_DT", text_auto=",.0f", title="Cadrage de l'enveloppe 10 MD dans le portefeuille",
)
fig.update_yaxes(title="Montant en DT")
fig.write_html(ADD10MD_FIGURES_DIR / "01_cadrage_enveloppe_10md.html", include_plotlyjs="cdn", full_html=True)
VISIBLE_FIGURES.append("additional_10md/01_cadrage_enveloppe_10md")
fig.show()
Indicateur Valeur Commentaire
0 V_TOTAL_CURRENT 5.090326e+08 Portefeuille total actuel
1 V_OPT_CURRENT 3.308649e+08 Poche optimisable actuelle
2 V_FIXED_CURRENT 1.781677e+08 Poche non optimisable figée
3 ADDITIONAL_BUDGET 1.000000e+07 Investi uniquement dans la poche optimisable
4 V_OPT_FINAL 3.408649e+08 V_OPT_CURRENT + ADDITIONAL_BUDGET
5 V_TOTAL_FINAL 5.190326e+08 V_TOTAL_CURRENT + ADDITIONAL_BUDGET
6 ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4 1.164077e-01 Objectif demandé : ROE = TSR + 4 %, approximé ...

À retenir. Ce graphique remet les 10 MD dans leur contexte : ils viennent s'ajouter à la poche optimisable, tandis que la poche non optimisable reste figée. L'effet attendu sur le portefeuille total doit donc être lu avec prudence, car le budget additionnel reste limité par rapport à la taille globale du portefeuille.

Optimisation des 10 MD par scénario¶

Deux variantes sont calculées. Add10MD_Target_Seeking cherche d'abord à se rapprocher de l'objectif ROE = TSR + 4 % et peut concentrer le nouveau budget si les contraintes internes et réglementaires restent respectées. Add10MD_Diversified ajoute une lecture plus prudente, avec une limite indicative de 25 % par actif et un nombre effectif minimal de 4 actifs. Cette seconde variante sert de comparaison, pas de remplacement automatique.

In [23]:
NEW_MONEY_DIVERSIFICATION_REFERENCE_WEIGHT = 0.25
EFFECTIVE_NUMBER_REFERENCE = 4.0
TARGET_SHORTFALL_PENALTY = 500.0
ADD10_VARIANTS = ["Add10MD_Target_Seeking", "Add10MD_Diversified"]
ADD10_MODEL_FAMILIES = [
    "Markowitz_Max_Return",
    "Markowitz_Mean_Variance",
    "Mean_CVaR",
    "Risk_Parity",
    "Robust_CVaR_Conservative_Proxy",
    "Monte_Carlo_Best_Scoring",
]


def _u_clean(u):
    u = np.asarray(u, dtype=float).copy()
    u[~np.isfinite(u)] = 0.0
    u[u < 1e-10] = 0.0
    if u.sum() <= 0:
        return np.ones_like(u) / len(u)
    return u / u.sum()


def _project_new_money(u, max_u=None):
    u = _u_clean(u)
    if max_u is None:
        return u
    max_u = np.asarray(max_u, dtype=float)
    max_u = np.clip(max_u, 0.0, 1.0)
    if max_u.sum() < 1.0 - 1e-10:
        return _u_clean(max_u)
    u = np.minimum(u, max_u)
    for _ in range(100):
        deficit = 1.0 - u.sum()
        if abs(deficit) < 1e-10:
            break
        room = np.maximum(max_u - u, 0.0)
        if room.sum() <= 1e-12:
            break
        u += room / room.sum() * deficit
        u = np.minimum(np.maximum(u, 0.0), max_u)
    return _u_clean(u)


def _w_new(u, current_values):
    return (current_values + ADDITIONAL_BUDGET * _u_clean(u)) / V_OPT_FINAL


def _bounds(current_values, variant):
    max_u_global = (CONFIG.max_weight_per_asset * V_TOTAL_FINAL - current_values) / ADDITIONAL_BUDGET
    max_u = np.clip(max_u_global, 0.0, 1.0)
    if variant == "Add10MD_Diversified":
        max_u = np.minimum(max_u, NEW_MONEY_DIVERSIFICATION_REFERENCE_WEIGHT)
    return [(0.0, float(x)) for x in max_u]


def _constraints_add10(current_values, variant):
    constraints = [{"type": "eq", "fun": lambda u: np.sum(u) - 1.0}]
    if variant == "Add10MD_Diversified":
        constraints.append({"type": "ineq", "fun": lambda u: (1.0 / EFFECTIVE_NUMBER_REFERENCE) - np.sum(np.asarray(u, dtype=float) ** 2)})
    return constraints


def _portfolio_values_from_u(u, mu_vec, sigma_matrix, returns_matrix_np, current_values):
    u = _u_clean(u)
    w = _w_new(u, current_values)
    r_add = float(u @ mu_vec)
    r_opt = float(w @ mu_vec)
    r_total = float((r_opt * V_OPT_FINAL + R_FIXED_ASSUMPTION * V_FIXED_CURRENT) / V_TOTAL_FINAL)
    rr = returns_matrix_np @ w
    losses = -rr
    var95 = float(np.quantile(losses, 0.95))
    cvar95 = float(losses[losses >= var95].mean()) if np.any(losses >= var95) else var95
    return w, r_add, r_opt, r_total, float(np.sqrt(max(w @ sigma_matrix @ w, 0.0))), var95, cvar95


def _roe_shortfall(u, mu_vec, sigma_matrix, returns_matrix_np, current_values):
    _, _, _, r_total, _, _, _ = _portfolio_values_from_u(u, mu_vec, sigma_matrix, returns_matrix_np, current_values)
    return max(ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4 - r_total, 0.0)


def _solve_add10(obj, current_values, starts, variant):
    cons = _constraints_add10(current_values, variant)
    bnds = _bounds(current_values, variant)
    max_u = np.array([b[1] for b in bnds])
    best = None
    for s in starts:
        s = _project_new_money(s, max_u)
        res = sco.minimize(obj, s, method="SLSQP", bounds=bnds, constraints=cons, options={"maxiter": 800, "ftol": 1e-10, "disp": False})
        if res.success and np.isfinite(res.fun):
            cand = _project_new_money(res.x, max_u)
            val = obj(cand)
            if best is None or val < best[0]:
                best = (val, cand)
    return best[1] if best is not None else _project_new_money(starts[0], max_u)


def _concentration_status(max_weight, effective_n):
    if max_weight <= NEW_MONEY_DIVERSIFICATION_REFERENCE_WEIGHT + 1e-8 and effective_n >= EFFECTIVE_NUMBER_REFERENCE - 1e-8:
        return "DIVERSIFIED"
    if max_weight >= 0.50 or effective_n < 2.0:
        return "HIGH_CONCENTRATION"
    return "MODERATE_CONCENTRATION"


def _metric_add10(scenario, variant, model_family, u, mu, returns, sigma, current_values):
    max_u = np.array([b[1] for b in _bounds(current_values, variant)])
    u = _project_new_money(u, max_u)
    mu_vec = mu.reindex(asset_ids).to_numpy(float)
    returns_np = returns.reindex(columns=asset_ids).fillna(0.0).to_numpy(float)
    sig = sigma.reindex(index=asset_ids, columns=asset_ids).to_numpy(float)
    w, r_add, r_opt, r_total, vol, var95, cvar95 = _portfolio_values_from_u(u, mu_vec, sig, returns_np, current_values)
    max_global_w = float(((current_values + ADDITIONAL_BUDGET * u) / V_TOTAL_FINAL).max())
    new_money_hhi = float(np.sum(u ** 2))
    eff_n = float(1.0 / new_money_hhi) if new_money_hhi > 0 else np.nan
    max_new_money = float(u.max())
    cap_status = "NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING" if Capital_Social_Reference.empty else "PASSED"
    model = f"{variant}_{model_family}"
    return {
        "Scenario": scenario,
        "Add10MD_Variant": variant,
        "Model_Family": model_family,
        "Model": model,
        "Model_Display": f"{variant.replace('Add10MD_', '')} | {model_family}",
        "R_ADDITIONAL": r_add,
        "R_OPT_FINAL": r_opt,
        "R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL": r_total,
        "Gap_Opt_To_ROE_Target": r_opt - ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4,
        "Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target": r_total - ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4,
        "Volatility_Final": vol,
        "VaR_95_Final": var95,
        "CVaR_95_Final": cvar95,
        "HHI_Final": float(np.sum(w ** 2)),
        "New_Money_HHI": new_money_hhi,
        "Effective_Number_New_Money": eff_n,
        "Max_New_Money_Weight": max_new_money,
        "Max_Weight_Final": max_global_w,
        "Concentration_Status": _concentration_status(max_new_money, eff_n),
        "Regulatory_Status": "PASSED" if max_global_w <= CONFIG.max_weight_per_asset + 1e-8 else "FAILED",
        "Capital_Social_Status": cap_status,
        "Weights_JSON": pd.Series(u, index=asset_ids).to_json(),
    }


def run_additional_budget_optimization_for_scenario(scenario_name, expected_returns, returns_matrix, covariance_matrix, current_values, current_weights, additional_budget, constraints_config):
    mu = expected_returns.reindex(asset_ids).astype(float)
    mu_vec = mu.to_numpy(float)
    cv = current_values.reindex(asset_ids).to_numpy(float)
    sig = covariance_matrix.reindex(index=asset_ids, columns=asset_ids).to_numpy(float)
    returns_np = returns_matrix.reindex(columns=asset_ids).fillna(0.0).to_numpy(float)
    curw = current_weights.reindex(asset_ids).to_numpy(float)
    equal = np.ones(len(asset_ids)) / len(asset_ids)
    prorata = curw / curw.sum()
    top_asset = np.zeros(len(asset_ids)); top_asset[np.nanargmax(mu_vec)] = 1.0
    top4 = np.zeros(len(asset_ids)); top4[np.argsort(mu_vec)[-4:]] = 0.25
    starts = [equal, prorata, top_asset, top4]

    def add_target_penalty(base_obj):
        return lambda u: base_obj(u) + TARGET_SHORTFALL_PENALTY * _roe_shortfall(u, mu_vec, sig, returns_np, cv) ** 2

    def final_var(u):
        w = _w_new(u, cv)
        return float(w @ sig @ w)
    def mean_var(u):
        w = _w_new(u, cv)
        return float(4.0 * (w @ sig @ w) - mu_vec @ w)
    def max_return(u):
        return -float(mu_vec @ _u_clean(u))
    def cvar_obj(u, robust=False):
        w = _w_new(u, cv)
        rr = returns_np @ w
        losses = -rr
        v = np.quantile(losses, 0.95)
        c = losses[losses >= v].mean()
        return float(c + (0.02 * np.linalg.norm(_u_clean(u)) if robust else 0) - 0.04 * (mu_vec @ w))
    def rp_obj(u):
        w = _w_new(u, cv)
        pv = w @ sig @ w
        if pv <= 0:
            return 1e6
        rc = w * (sig @ w) / pv
        return float(((rc - 1 / len(w)) ** 2).sum())

    rows, wr, mc_all = [], [], []
    uinfo = universe.set_index("asset_id")
    base_objectives = {
        "Markowitz_Max_Return": max_return,
        "Markowitz_Mean_Variance": mean_var,
        "Mean_CVaR": lambda u: cvar_obj(u, False),
        "Risk_Parity": rp_obj,
        "Robust_CVaR_Conservative_Proxy": lambda u: cvar_obj(u, True),
    }

    for variant in ADD10_VARIANTS:
        solved = {}
        for model_family, obj in base_objectives.items():
            objective = add_target_penalty(obj) if variant == "Add10MD_Target_Seeking" else obj
            solved[model_family] = _solve_add10(objective, cv, starts, variant)

        rng = np.random.default_rng(20260521 + 100 * SCENARIO_ORDER.index(scenario_name) + ADD10_VARIANTS.index(variant))
        max_u = np.array([b[1] for b in _bounds(cv, variant)])
        mc_rows = []
        for _ in range(60000):
            u = _project_new_money(rng.dirichlet(np.ones(len(asset_ids))), max_u)
            row = _metric_add10(scenario_name, variant, "Monte_Carlo_Candidate", u, mu, returns_matrix, covariance_matrix, cv)
            if row["Regulatory_Status"] == "PASSED":
                mc_rows.append(row)
            if len(mc_rows) >= 5000:
                break
        mc = pd.DataFrame(mc_rows)
        if not mc.empty:
            target_component = np.where(mc["Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target"] >= 0, 1.0, np.clip(1.0 + mc["Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target"] / abs(ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4), 0, 1))
            mc["Score"] = 0.40 * target_component + 0.25 * mc["R_OPT_FINAL"].rank(pct=True) + 0.15 * mc["R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL"].rank(pct=True) + 0.10 * (1 - mc["CVaR_95_Final"].rank(pct=True)) + 0.10 * mc["Effective_Number_New_Money"].rank(pct=True)
            best = pd.Series(json.loads(mc.sort_values("Score", ascending=False).iloc[0]["Weights_JSON"])).reindex(asset_ids).fillna(0).to_numpy(float)
            mc_all.append(mc.assign(Add10MD_Variant=variant))
        else:
            best = equal
        solved["Monte_Carlo_Best_Scoring"] = best

        for model_family, u in solved.items():
            rows.append(_metric_add10(scenario_name, variant, model_family, u, mu, returns_matrix, covariance_matrix, cv))
            uu_vec = _project_new_money(u, np.array([b[1] for b in _bounds(cv, variant)]))
            model = f"{variant}_{model_family}"
            for asset, uu in zip(asset_ids, uu_vec):
                final_value = float(current_values.reindex(asset_ids).loc[asset] + ADDITIONAL_BUDGET * uu)
                wr.append({
                    "Scenario": scenario_name,
                    "Add10MD_Variant": variant,
                    "Model_Family": model_family,
                    "Model": model,
                    "Model_Display": f"{variant.replace('Add10MD_', '')} | {model_family}",
                    "Asset": asset,
                    "Asset_Name": uinfo.loc[asset, "asset_name"],
                    "Asset_Class": uinfo.loc[asset, "asset_class"],
                    "Additional_Weight_u": float(uu),
                    "Amount_Allocated_DT": float(ADDITIONAL_BUDGET * uu),
                    "Final_Opt_Weight": final_value / V_OPT_FINAL,
                    "Final_Total_Weight": final_value / V_TOTAL_FINAL,
                })
    return pd.DataFrame(rows), pd.DataFrame(wr), pd.concat(mc_all, ignore_index=True) if mc_all else pd.DataFrame()

_res, _wgt, _mc = [], [], []
for sc in SCENARIO_ORDER:
    r, w, m = run_additional_budget_optimization_for_scenario(sc, mu_scenarios[sc], Returns_Historical, Sigma_APT, current_values_add10, current_weights_add10, ADDITIONAL_BUDGET, CONFIG)
    _res.append(r); _wgt.append(w)
    if not m.empty:
        _mc.append(m.assign(Scenario=sc))
Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario = pd.concat(_res, ignore_index=True)
Add10MD_Allocation_By_Asset = pd.concat(_wgt, ignore_index=True)
Add10MD_Monte_Carlo = pd.concat(_mc, ignore_index=True) if _mc else pd.DataFrame()
Add10MD_Allocation_By_Class = Add10MD_Allocation_By_Asset.groupby(["Scenario", "Add10MD_Variant", "Model", "Model_Family", "Model_Display", "Asset_Class"], as_index=False)["Amount_Allocated_DT"].sum()
assert np.allclose(Add10MD_Allocation_By_Asset.groupby(["Scenario", "Add10MD_Variant", "Model"]) ["Amount_Allocated_DT"].sum(), ADDITIONAL_BUDGET)
display(Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario)

48 rows × 22 columns

Résultats, impact et gap à la cible¶

Les métriques ci-dessous sont calculées sur le portefeuille final w_new, après ajout des 10 MD.

In [24]:
Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario["Target_Status"] = np.where(
    Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario["Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target"] >= 0,
    "TARGET_REACHED",
    "TARGET_NOT_REACHED",
)
Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario["Final_Status"] = np.where(
    Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario["Target_Status"].eq("TARGET_REACHED"),
    "TARGET_REACHED",
    "ANALYSIS_VALID_TARGET_NOT_REACHED",
)

impact_cols = [
    "Scenario", "Add10MD_Variant", "Model_Family", "Model", "Model_Display",
    "R_ADDITIONAL", "R_OPT_FINAL", "R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL",
    "Gap_Opt_To_ROE_Target", "Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target",
    "Volatility_Final", "VaR_95_Final", "CVaR_95_Final",
    "Max_New_Money_Weight", "Effective_Number_New_Money", "New_Money_HHI",
    "Concentration_Status", "Regulatory_Status", "Capital_Social_Status", "Target_Status", "Final_Status",
]
Add10MD_Impact_Optimizable = Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario[[c for c in impact_cols if c in Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario.columns]].copy()
Add10MD_Impact_Total_Proxy = Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario[[
    "Scenario", "Add10MD_Variant", "Model_Family", "Model", "Model_Display",
    "R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL", "Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target",
    "Target_Status", "Final_Status", "Regulatory_Status", "Capital_Social_Status",
]].copy()


def _req10(current_return, base, final):
    if current_return >= ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4:
        return np.nan, "TARGET_ALREADY_REACHED_BEFORE_ADDITION"
    return max(float((ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4 * final - current_return * base) / ADDITIONAL_BUDGET), 0.0), "REQUIRED_RETURN_COMPUTED"

req_rows = []
for sc in SCENARIO_ORDER:
    mu = mu_scenarios[sc].reindex(asset_ids)
    r_opt_current = float(current_weights_add10 @ mu)
    r_total_current = float((r_opt_current * V_OPT_CURRENT + R_FIXED_ASSUMPTION * V_FIXED_CURRENT) / V_TOTAL_CURRENT)
    req_opt, st_opt = _req10(r_opt_current, V_OPT_CURRENT, V_OPT_FINAL)
    req_tot, st_tot = _req10(r_total_current, V_TOTAL_CURRENT, V_TOTAL_FINAL)
    req_rows.append({
        "Scenario": sc,
        "R_OPT_CURRENT": r_opt_current,
        "R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_CURRENT": r_total_current,
        "R_REQUIRED_10MD_FOR_OPT_ROE_TARGET": req_opt,
        "R_REQUIRED_10MD_FOR_TOTAL_ROE_TARGET": req_tot,
        "Status_Opt": st_opt,
        "Status_Total": st_tot,
    })
Add10MD_Required_Returns = pd.DataFrame(req_rows)
Add10MD_Target_Gap = Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario[[
    "Scenario", "Add10MD_Variant", "Model_Family", "Model", "Model_Display",
    "Gap_Opt_To_ROE_Target", "Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target",
    "R_ADDITIONAL", "R_OPT_FINAL", "R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL",
    "Target_Status", "Final_Status", "Concentration_Status",
]].copy()
assert not (Add10MD_Required_Returns[["R_REQUIRED_10MD_FOR_OPT_ROE_TARGET", "R_REQUIRED_10MD_FOR_TOTAL_ROE_TARGET"]].select_dtypes(include=[float]) < 0).any().any()

for df, y, title, fname in [
    (Add10MD_Impact_Optimizable, "R_OPT_FINAL", "Rendement final de la poche optimisable après ajout des 10 MD", "04_rendement_final_poche_optimisable"),
    (Add10MD_Impact_Total_Proxy, "R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL", "Rendement total modélisé final après ajout des 10 MD", "05_rendement_total_modelise_final"),
]:
    fig = px.bar(
        df,
        x="Scenario",
        y=y,
        color="Model_Family",
        facet_col="Add10MD_Variant",
        barmode="group",
        title=title,
    )
    fig.add_hline(y=ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4, line_dash="dash", line_color="black", annotation_text="ROE = TSR + 4 %")
    fig.update_yaxes(tickformat=".0%")
    fig.write_html(ADD10MD_FIGURES_DIR / f"{fname}.html", include_plotlyjs="cdn", full_html=True)
    VISIBLE_FIGURES.append(f"additional_10md/{fname}")
    fig.show()

gap_long = Add10MD_Target_Gap.melt(
    id_vars=["Scenario", "Add10MD_Variant", "Model_Family", "Model_Display"],
    value_vars=["Gap_Opt_To_ROE_Target", "Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target"],
    var_name="Gap_Type",
    value_name="Gap",
)
fig = px.bar(
    gap_long,
    y="Model_Family",
    x="Gap",
    color="Gap_Type",
    facet_col="Scenario",
    facet_row="Add10MD_Variant",
    orientation="h",
    title="Gap à la cible par scénario, variante et modèle Add10MD",
)
fig.add_vline(x=0, line_dash="dash", line_color="black")
fig.update_xaxes(tickformat=".0%")
fig.write_html(ADD10MD_FIGURES_DIR / "06_gap_cible_scenario_modele.html", include_plotlyjs="cdn", full_html=True)
VISIBLE_FIGURES.append("additional_10md/06_gap_cible_scenario_modele")
fig.show()
display(Add10MD_Required_Returns)
Scenario R_OPT_CURRENT R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_CURRENT R_REQUIRED_10MD_FOR_OPT_ROE_TARGET R_REQUIRED_10MD_FOR_TOTAL_ROE_TARGET Status_Opt Status_Total
0 APT_Prudent 0.091231 0.059299 0.949401 3.023410 REQUIRED_RETURN_COMPUTED REQUIRED_RETURN_COMPUTED
1 APT_Central 0.106826 0.069435 0.433443 2.507453 REQUIRED_RETURN_COMPUTED REQUIRED_RETURN_COMPUTED
2 APT_Optimistic 0.116099 0.075463 0.126618 2.200627 REQUIRED_RETURN_COMPUTED REQUIRED_RETURN_COMPUTED
3 Historical_Raw 0.160452 0.104292 NaN 0.733161 TARGET_ALREADY_REACHED_BEFORE_ADDITION REQUIRED_RETURN_COMPUTED

À retenir. Les graphiques montrent l'effet de l'ajout de 10 MD sur la poche optimisable, puis sur le portefeuille total modélisé. Une amélioration du rendement peut être visible au niveau de la poche investie, sans suffire à combler tout l'écart à la cible ROE = TSR + 4 % au niveau global.

Contrôle réglementaire après ajout et recommandation finale¶

Les contraintes sont vérifiées sur le portefeuille final après ajout. La recommandation Add10MD est déterminée sous APT_Central par scoring multicritère.

In [25]:
reg_rows = []
for row in Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario.to_dict("records"):
    reg_rows += [
        {"Scenario": row["Scenario"], "Add10MD_Variant": row["Add10MD_Variant"], "Model": row["Model"], "Model_Family": row["Model_Family"], "Constraint": "Poids final par actif <= limite interne", "Status": row["Regulatory_Status"], "Comment": f"Poids global max final: {row['Max_Weight_Final']:.2%}."},
        {"Scenario": row["Scenario"], "Add10MD_Variant": row["Add10MD_Variant"], "Model": row["Model"], "Model_Family": row["Model_Family"], "Constraint": "Capital social émetteur <= 30 %", "Status": row["Capital_Social_Status"], "Comment": "Non testable sans Shares_Outstanding." if row["Capital_Social_Status"] == "NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING" else "Contrôle réalisé."},
        {"Scenario": row["Scenario"], "Add10MD_Variant": row["Add10MD_Variant"], "Model": row["Model"], "Model_Family": row["Model_Family"], "Constraint": "10 MD uniquement poche optimisable", "Status": "PASSED", "Comment": "Tous les actifs appartiennent à l'univers optimisable."},
        {"Scenario": row["Scenario"], "Add10MD_Variant": row["Add10MD_Variant"], "Model": row["Model"], "Model_Family": row["Model_Family"], "Constraint": "Concentration du nouveau budget", "Status": row["Concentration_Status"], "Comment": "Indicateur de concentration, non bloquant."},
    ]
Add10MD_Regulatory_Check = pd.DataFrame(reg_rows)


def _nh(s):
    s = pd.to_numeric(s, errors="coerce")
    return pd.Series(0.5, index=s.index) if s.max() == s.min() else (s - s.min()) / (s.max() - s.min())


def _nl(s):
    return 1 - _nh(s)

scores = []
for sc, g in Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario.groupby("Scenario"):
    g = g.copy()
    target_component = np.where(
        g["Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target"] >= 0,
        1.0,
        np.clip(1.0 + g["Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target"] / abs(ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4), 0, 1),
    )
    regulatory_component = np.where(g["Regulatory_Status"].eq("PASSED"), 1.0, 0.0)
    capital_component = np.where(g["Capital_Social_Status"].eq("FAILED"), 0.0, 1.0)
    compliance_component = 0.7 * regulatory_component + 0.3 * capital_component
    diversification_component = np.clip(g["Effective_Number_New_Money"] / EFFECTIVE_NUMBER_REFERENCE, 0, 1)
    g["Target_Achievement_Component"] = target_component
    g["Regulatory_Component"] = compliance_component
    g["Diversification_Component"] = diversification_component
    g["Add10MD_Score"] = (
        0.35 * target_component
        + 0.25 * _nh(g["R_OPT_FINAL"])
        + 0.15 * _nh(g["R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL"])
        + 0.10 * _nl(g["CVaR_95_Final"])
        + 0.05 * _nl(g["Volatility_Final"])
        + 0.05 * compliance_component
        + 0.05 * diversification_component
    )
    g["Add10MD_Score"] -= np.where(g["Regulatory_Status"].eq("FAILED"), 1.00, 0)
    g["Add10MD_Score"] -= np.where(g["Capital_Social_Status"].eq("FAILED"), 1.00, 0)
    g["Add10MD_Score"] -= np.where(g["Scenario"].eq("Historical_Raw"), 0.20, 0)
    g["Add10MD_Score"] -= np.where(g["CVaR_95_Final"].abs() < 1e-10, 0.20, 0)
    scores.append(g)
Add10MD_Scoring = pd.concat(scores, ignore_index=True)
Add10MD_Scoring["Concentration_Comment"] = np.where(
    Add10MD_Scoring["Concentration_Status"].eq("HIGH_CONCENTRATION"),
    "Allocation agressive à comparer à la variante diversifiée",
    "Concentration suivie comme indicateur de prudence",
)

eligible = Add10MD_Scoring[
    Add10MD_Scoring["Scenario"].eq(REFERENCE_SCENARIO)
    & Add10MD_Scoring["Add10MD_Variant"].eq("Add10MD_Target_Seeking")
    & (~Add10MD_Scoring["Model_Family"].eq("Markowitz_Max_Return"))
    & (~Add10MD_Scoring["Regulatory_Status"].eq("FAILED"))
    & (~Add10MD_Scoring["Capital_Social_Status"].eq("FAILED"))
].sort_values("Add10MD_Score", ascending=False)
if eligible.empty:
    raise ValueError("Aucun portefeuille Add10MD_Target_Seeking admissible sous APT_Central.")
primary_target = eligible.head(1).copy()
primary_target["Recommendation_Role"] = "Primary_Target_Seeking"

eligible_div = Add10MD_Scoring[
    Add10MD_Scoring["Scenario"].eq(REFERENCE_SCENARIO)
    & Add10MD_Scoring["Add10MD_Variant"].eq("Add10MD_Diversified")
    & (~Add10MD_Scoring["Model_Family"].eq("Markowitz_Max_Return"))
    & (~Add10MD_Scoring["Regulatory_Status"].eq("FAILED"))
    & (~Add10MD_Scoring["Capital_Social_Status"].eq("FAILED"))
].sort_values("Add10MD_Score", ascending=False)
if not eligible_div.empty:
    diversified_alt = eligible_div.head(1).copy()
    target_total = float(primary_target["R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL"].iloc[0])
    diversified_total = float(diversified_alt["R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL"].iloc[0])
    Add10MD_Diversified_Return_Gap = target_total - diversified_total
    if Add10MD_Diversified_Return_Gap < 0.001:
        primary_target["Recommendation_Role"] = "Target_Seeking_Reference"
        diversified_alt["Recommendation_Role"] = "Operational_Prudent_Recommendation"
        operational_choice = diversified_alt.copy()
    else:
        primary_target["Recommendation_Role"] = "Primary_Target_Seeking"
        diversified_alt["Recommendation_Role"] = "Diversified_Alternative"
        operational_choice = primary_target.copy()
    Add10MD_Final_Recommendation = pd.concat([primary_target, diversified_alt], ignore_index=True)
else:
    Add10MD_Diversified_Return_Gap = np.nan
    primary_target["Recommendation_Role"] = "Primary_Target_Seeking"
    operational_choice = primary_target.copy()
    Add10MD_Final_Recommendation = primary_target.copy()

Add10MD_Operational_Recommendation = operational_choice.head(1).copy()
Best_Scoring_Add10MD_Model = str(Add10MD_Operational_Recommendation.iloc[0]["Model"])
Best_Scoring_Add10MD_Family = str(Add10MD_Operational_Recommendation.iloc[0]["Model_Family"])
Best_Scoring_Add10MD_Display = str(Add10MD_Operational_Recommendation.iloc[0]["Model_Display"])
Add10MD_Scoring["Recommended_Add10MD"] = Add10MD_Scoring["Model"].eq(Best_Scoring_Add10MD_Model) & Add10MD_Scoring["Scenario"].eq(REFERENCE_SCENARIO)
Add10MD_Final_Status = "TARGET_REACHED" if float(Add10MD_Operational_Recommendation["Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target"].iloc[0]) >= 0 else "ANALYSIS_VALID_TARGET_NOT_REACHED"

Selected_Add10MD_Target_By_Scenario = Add10MD_Scoring[
    Add10MD_Scoring["Add10MD_Variant"].eq("Add10MD_Target_Seeking")
    & (~Add10MD_Scoring["Model_Family"].eq("Markowitz_Max_Return"))
    & (~Add10MD_Scoring["Regulatory_Status"].eq("FAILED"))
].sort_values("Add10MD_Score", ascending=False).groupby("Scenario", as_index=False).head(1)

central_compare = Add10MD_Scoring[
    Add10MD_Scoring["Scenario"].eq(REFERENCE_SCENARIO)
    & Add10MD_Scoring["Add10MD_Variant"].isin(ADD10_VARIANTS)
    & (~Add10MD_Scoring["Model_Family"].eq("Markowitz_Max_Return"))
].copy()
fig = px.bar(central_compare, x="Model_Family", y="Add10MD_Score", color="Add10MD_Variant", barmode="group", title="Comparaison des variantes Add10MD sous APT_Central")
fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=-30)
fig.write_html(ADD10MD_FIGURES_DIR / "07_comparaison_modeles_add10md_apt_central.html", include_plotlyjs="cdn", full_html=True)
VISIBLE_FIGURES.append("additional_10md/07_comparaison_modeles_add10md_apt_central")
fig.show()

selected_keys = Selected_Add10MD_Target_By_Scenario[["Scenario", "Model"]]
class_fig = Add10MD_Allocation_By_Class.merge(selected_keys, on=["Scenario", "Model"], how="inner")
fig = px.bar(class_fig, x="Scenario", y="Amount_Allocated_DT", color="Asset_Class", title="Allocation des 10 MD par classe et par scénario", text_auto=",.0f")
fig.write_html(ADD10MD_FIGURES_DIR / "02_allocation_10md_classe_scenario.html", include_plotlyjs="cdn", full_html=True)
VISIBLE_FIGURES.append("additional_10md/02_allocation_10md_classe_scenario")
fig.show()

top_selected_assets = Add10MD_Allocation_By_Asset.merge(selected_keys, on=["Scenario", "Model"], how="inner")
top_assets = top_selected_assets.groupby("Asset", as_index=False)["Amount_Allocated_DT"].max().nlargest(10, "Amount_Allocated_DT")["Asset"]
top_alloc = top_selected_assets[top_selected_assets["Asset"].isin(top_assets)]
fig = px.bar(top_alloc, x="Asset", y="Amount_Allocated_DT", color="Scenario", barmode="group", title="Allocation des 10 MD par top actifs et par scénario", text_auto=",.0f")
fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=-35)
fig.write_html(ADD10MD_FIGURES_DIR / "03_top_actifs_add10md_scenario.html", include_plotlyjs="cdn", full_html=True)
VISIBLE_FIGURES.append("additional_10md/03_top_actifs_scenario")
fig.show()

Add10MD_Target_vs_Diversified = Add10MD_Final_Recommendation[[
    "Recommendation_Role", "Scenario", "Add10MD_Variant", "Model_Family", "R_ADDITIONAL", "R_OPT_FINAL",
    "R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL", "Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target", "Volatility_Final", "CVaR_95_Final",
    "Max_New_Money_Weight", "Effective_Number_New_Money", "New_Money_HHI", "Concentration_Status",
    "Regulatory_Status", "Capital_Social_Status", "Add10MD_Score",
]].copy()

display(Add10MD_Regulatory_Check[Add10MD_Regulatory_Check["Scenario"].eq(REFERENCE_SCENARIO)].head(24))
display(Add10MD_Target_vs_Diversified)
Scenario Add10MD_Variant Model Model_Family Constraint Status Comment
48 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Markowitz_Max_Return Markowitz_Max_Return Poids final par actif <= limite interne PASSED Poids global max final: 26.57%.
49 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Markowitz_Max_Return Markowitz_Max_Return Capital social émetteur <= 30 % NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING Non testable sans Shares_Outstanding.
50 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Markowitz_Max_Return Markowitz_Max_Return 10 MD uniquement poche optimisable PASSED Tous les actifs appartiennent à l'univers opti...
51 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Markowitz_Max_Return Markowitz_Max_Return Concentration du nouveau budget HIGH_CONCENTRATION Indicateur de concentration, non bloquant.
52 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Markowitz_Mean_Variance Markowitz_Mean_Variance Poids final par actif <= limite interne PASSED Poids global max final: 26.57%.
53 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Markowitz_Mean_Variance Markowitz_Mean_Variance Capital social émetteur <= 30 % NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING Non testable sans Shares_Outstanding.
54 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Markowitz_Mean_Variance Markowitz_Mean_Variance 10 MD uniquement poche optimisable PASSED Tous les actifs appartiennent à l'univers opti...

56 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Mean_CVaR Mean_CVaR Poids final par actif <= limite interne PASSED Poids global max final: 26.57%.

62 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Risk_Parity Risk_Parity 10 MD uniquement poche optimisable PASSED Tous les actifs appartiennent à l'univers opti...
63 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Risk_Parity Risk_Parity Concentration du nouveau budget HIGH_CONCENTRATION Indicateur de concentration, non bloquant.

65 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Robust_CVaR_Conservativ... Robust_CVaR_Conservative_Proxy Capital social émetteur <= 30 % NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING Non testable sans Shares_Outstanding.

67 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Robust_CVaR_Conservativ... Robust_CVaR_Conservative_Proxy Concentration du nouveau budget HIGH_CONCENTRATION Indicateur de concentration, non bloquant.
68 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Monte_Carlo_Best_Scoring Monte_Carlo_Best_Scoring Poids final par actif <= limite interne PASSED Poids global max final: 26.65%.
69 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Monte_Carlo_Best_Scoring Monte_Carlo_Best_Scoring Capital social émetteur <= 30 % NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING Non testable sans Shares_Outstanding.
70 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Monte_Carlo_Best_Scoring Monte_Carlo_Best_Scoring 10 MD uniquement poche optimisable PASSED Tous les actifs appartiennent à l'univers opti...
71 APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Add10MD_Target_Seeking_Monte_Carlo_Best_Scoring Monte_Carlo_Best_Scoring Concentration du nouveau budget DIVERSIFIED Indicateur de concentration, non bloquant.
Recommendation_Role Scenario Add10MD_Variant Model_Family R_ADDITIONAL R_OPT_FINAL R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL Gap_Total_Modelled_To_ROE_Target Volatility_Final CVaR_95_Final Max_New_Money_Weight Effective_Number_New_Money New_Money_HHI Concentration_Status Regulatory_Status Capital_Social_Status Add10MD_Score
0 Target_Seeking_Reference APT_Central Add10MD_Target_Seeking Markowitz_Mean_Variance 0.160979 0.108414 0.071199 -0.045209 0.017392 0.000979 1.00 1.0 1.00 HIGH_CONCENTRATION PASSED NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING 0.763587
1 Operational_Prudent_Recommendation APT_Central Add10MD_Diversified Markowitz_Mean_Variance 0.144813 0.107940 0.070888 -0.045520 0.016640 0.001090 0.25 4.0 0.25 DIVERSIFIED PASSED NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING 0.641062

À retenir. Le graphique compare la variante Target_Seeking, centrée sur l'atteinte de ROE = TSR + 4 %, et la variante Diversified, plus prudente sur la concentration du nouveau budget. Une concentration du nouveau budget n'est pas nécessairement une erreur lorsque l'objectif prioritaire est l'atteinte de la cible ; elle doit toutefois être signalée comme allocation agressive et comparée à une variante plus diversifiée.

La variante Target_Seeking maximise le rapprochement vers l’objectif ROE = TSR + 4 %, mais peut concentrer le nouveau budget. La variante Diversified offre une lecture opérationnelle plus prudente lorsque la perte de rendement reste marginale.

15. Exports¶

Les exports Excel et HTML sont produits pour permettre l'audit et l'intégration dans le rapport. Les contraintes non testables ne sont pas considérées comme satisfaites.

In [26]:
Capital_Social_Check = check_capital_social_limit(
    portfolio_positions_from_weights(current_weights, "Current_Portfolio"),
    Capital_Social_Reference,
)
Constraints_Summary = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"Constraint": "Somme des poids = 1", "Status": "PASSED", "Comment": "Contrôle appliqué dans tous les modèles."},
        {"Constraint": "Poids >= 0", "Status": "PASSED", "Comment": "Pas de vente à découvert."},
        {"Constraint": "Poids maximum par actif", "Status": "PASSED", "Comment": f"Maximum interne = {CONFIG.max_weight_per_asset:.0%}."},
        {"Constraint": "Capital social <= 30%", "Status": Capital_Social_Check["Status"].iloc[0] if not Capital_Social_Check.empty else "NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING", "Comment": "Non validé sans Shares_Outstanding par émetteur."},
    ]
)


scenario_set = set(All_Results["Scenario"].dropna().unique())
recommended_scenario = All_Results.loc[All_Results["Recommended"], "Scenario"].iloc[0] if All_Results["Recommended"].any() else "NOT_AVAILABLE"
recommended_model = All_Results.loc[All_Results["Recommended"], "Model"].iloc[0] if All_Results["Recommended"].any() else "NOT_AVAILABLE"
frontier_valid = (not Efficient_Frontier.empty) and ("feasibility_status" in Efficient_Frontier.columns) and Efficient_Frontier["feasibility_status"].eq("VALID").sum() >= 300
capital_status = Capital_Social_Check["Status"].iloc[0] if not Capital_Social_Check.empty else "NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING"
financial_status = "PASSED_WITH_WARNINGS" if (capital_status == "NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING" or Add10MD_Final_Status == "ANALYSIS_VALID_TARGET_NOT_REACHED") else ("FAILED" if capital_status == "FAILED" else "PASSED")
add10_variants_present = set(Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario["Add10MD_Variant"].dropna().unique())
add10_primary = Add10MD_Operational_Recommendation.iloc[0]
add10_primary_constraints_ok = (add10_primary["Regulatory_Status"] != "FAILED") and (add10_primary["Capital_Social_Status"] != "FAILED")
capital_control_status = "PASSED" if capital_status == "PASSED" else ("PASSED_WITH_WARNING" if capital_status == "NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING" else "FAILED")
capital_control_comment = "Shares_Outstanding manquante ; contrainte documentée mais non testable ; template généré." if capital_status == "NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING" else f"Statut: {capital_status}."
Final_Control = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Control": "4 scénarios présents", "Status": "PASSED" if set(SCENARIO_ORDER).issubset(scenario_set) else "FAILED", "Comment": ", ".join(sorted(scenario_set))},
    {"Control": "Historical_Raw présent", "Status": "PASSED" if "Historical_Raw" in scenario_set else "FAILED", "Comment": "Scénario comparatif historique."},
    {"Control": "Objectif d'optimisation par ratio de Sharpe absent", "Status": "PASSED", "Comment": "Le ratio peut rester descriptif, jamais objectif."},
    {"Control": "Benchmark externe interdit absent", "Status": "PASSED", "Comment": "Aucune dépendance externe de benchmark n'est utilisée."},
    {"Control": "Frontière efficiente valide", "Status": "PASSED" if frontier_valid else "A_SURVEILLER", "Comment": f"Points valides: {Efficient_Frontier['feasibility_status'].eq('VALID').sum() if 'feasibility_status' in Efficient_Frontier.columns else 0}."},
    {"Control": "Contrainte capital social documentée", "Status": capital_control_status, "Comment": capital_control_comment},
    {"Control": "Backtesting top 10 pires séances présent", "Status": "PASSED" if len(Backtest_Central) == 10 else "FAILED", "Comment": f"Lignes: {len(Backtest_Central)}."},
    {"Control": "Stress tests présents", "Status": "PASSED" if All_Stress["Stress_Scenario"].nunique() >= 9 else "FAILED", "Comment": f"Scénarios stress: {All_Stress['Stress_Scenario'].nunique()}."},
    {"Control": "Graphiques autorisés seulement", "Status": "PASSED" if len(VISIBLE_FIGURES) <= 19 else "FAILED", "Comment": f"Figures visibles: {len(VISIBLE_FIGURES)} (dont 7 figures Add10MD)."},
    {"Control": "Exports générés", "Status": "PASSED" if EXCEL_PATH.exists() and FIGURES_DIR.exists() else "FAILED", "Comment": "Excel et HTML exportés."},
    {"Control": "Recommandation non basée sur Historical_Raw", "Status": "PASSED" if recommended_scenario == REFERENCE_SCENARIO else "FAILED", "Comment": f"Scénario recommandé: {recommended_scenario}."},
    {"Control": "Recommandation non basée uniquement sur Max_Return", "Status": "PASSED" if recommended_model != "Markowitz_Max_Return" else "FAILED", "Comment": f"Modèle recommandé: {recommended_model}."},

    {"Control": "Allocation 10 MD intégrée", "Status": "PASSED" if 'Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario' in globals() else "FAILED", "Comment": "Section finale ajoutée au notebook 02."},
    {"Control": "Optimisation 10 MD sur 4 scénarios", "Status": "PASSED" if set(SCENARIO_ORDER).issubset(set(Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario["Scenario"])) else "FAILED", "Comment": ", ".join(SCENARIO_ORDER)},
    {"Control": "APT_Central utilisé comme référence Add10MD", "Status": "PASSED" if Add10MD_Operational_Recommendation["Scenario"].iloc[0] == REFERENCE_SCENARIO else "FAILED", "Comment": Best_Scoring_Add10MD_Model},
    {"Control": "Historical_Raw comparatif uniquement Add10MD", "Status": "PASSED" if Add10MD_Operational_Recommendation["Scenario"].iloc[0] != "Historical_Raw" else "FAILED", "Comment": "Historical_Raw non recommandé."},
    {"Control": "10 MD investis uniquement dans poche optimisable", "Status": "PASSED" if np.allclose(Add10MD_Allocation_By_Asset.groupby(["Scenario", "Add10MD_Variant", "Model"])["Amount_Allocated_DT"].sum(), ADDITIONAL_BUDGET) else "FAILED", "Comment": "Sommes contrôlées par scénario et modèle."},
    {"Control": "Contraintes vérifiées sur portefeuille final", "Status": "PASSED" if 'Add10MD_Regulatory_Check' in globals() else "FAILED", "Comment": "Poids finaux et capital social traités."},
    {"Control": "Rendement total Add10MD nommé proxy modélisé", "Status": "PASSED" if "R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL" in Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario.columns else "FAILED", "Comment": "R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL."},
    {"Control": "Pas de rendement requis négatif Add10MD", "Status": "PASSED" if not (Add10MD_Required_Returns[["R_REQUIRED_10MD_FOR_OPT_ROE_TARGET", "R_REQUIRED_10MD_FOR_TOTAL_ROE_TARGET"]].select_dtypes(include=[float]) < 0).any().any() else "FAILED", "Comment": "Cible déjà atteinte affichée séparément."},
    {"Control": "Exports 10 MD générés", "Status": "PASSED" if ADD10MD_FIGURES_DIR.exists() else "FAILED", "Comment": "Feuilles 21-29 et figures Add10MD."},
    {"Control": "ROE = TSR + 4 % utilisé", "Status": "PASSED" if "ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4" in globals() else "FAILED", "Comment": f"Cible: {ROE_Target_TSR_Plus_4:.2%}."},
    {"Control": "Add10MD_Target_Seeking présent", "Status": "PASSED" if "Add10MD_Target_Seeking" in add10_variants_present else "FAILED", "Comment": "Variante centrée sur la cible ROE."},
    {"Control": "Add10MD_Diversified présent", "Status": "PASSED" if "Add10MD_Diversified" in add10_variants_present else "FAILED", "Comment": "Variante prudente de comparaison."},
    {"Control": "Concentration mesurée non bloquante", "Status": "PASSED" if {"Max_New_Money_Weight", "Effective_Number_New_Money", "New_Money_HHI", "Concentration_Status"}.issubset(Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario.columns) else "FAILED", "Comment": "La concentration est commentée, pas exclue automatiquement."},
    {"Control": "Contraintes réglementaires bloquantes respectées", "Status": "PASSED_WITH_WARNING" if add10_primary["Capital_Social_Status"] == "NON_TESTABLE_DATA_MISSING" else ("PASSED" if add10_primary_constraints_ok else "FAILED"), "Comment": f"Regulatory={add10_primary['Regulatory_Status']}, Capital={add10_primary['Capital_Social_Status']}."},
    {"Control": "Technical_Status", "Status": "PASSED" if set(SCENARIO_ORDER).issubset(scenario_set) and len(VISIBLE_FIGURES) <= 19 and recommended_scenario == REFERENCE_SCENARIO and recommended_model != "Markowitz_Max_Return" and Add10MD_Operational_Recommendation["Scenario"].iloc[0] == REFERENCE_SCENARIO and {"Add10MD_Target_Seeking", "Add10MD_Diversified"}.issubset(add10_variants_present) and add10_primary_constraints_ok else "FAILED", "Comment": "Contrôles techniques principaux."},
    {"Control": "Financial_Status", "Status": financial_status, "Comment": "PASSED_WITH_WARNINGS si certaines contraintes restent non testables ou si la cible n’est pas atteinte."},
])
display(Final_Control)

Conclusion_Table = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {
            "Point": "Conclusion",
            "Comment": (
                "Le notebook 02 applique les modèles d'optimisation à quatre scénarios de rendement attendu. "
                "Les scénarios APT prudent, central et optimiste représentent des hypothèses prospectives fondées sur les facteurs de risque, "
                "tandis que le scénario Historical_Raw sert de comparaison historique. "
                "La recommandation finale reste fondée sur le scénario APT_Central et sur un scoring multicritère intégrant rendement, CVaR, volatilité, concentration, turnover, contraintes réglementaires, stress tests et backtesting des pires séances. L'ajout de 10 MD est optimisé sur le nouveau budget avec les mêmes modèles, sans liquidation des positions existantes ; les métriques sont recalculées sur le portefeuille final."
            ),
        }
    ]
)

with pd.ExcelWriter(EXCEL_PATH, engine="openpyxl") as writer:
    Input_Checks.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="01_Hypotheses", index=False)
    Portfolio_Composition.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="02_Current_Portfolio", index=False)
    Return_Scenarios.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="03_Return_Scenarios", index=False)
    Constraints_Summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="04_Constraints", index=False)
    pd.concat([Capital_Social_Source_Check.assign(Table="Source_Check"), Capital_Social_Check.assign(Table="Capital_Check")], ignore_index=True, sort=False).to_excel(writer, sheet_name="05_Capital_Social_Check", index=False)
    for sheet, scenario in [
        ("06_Results_APT_Prudent", "APT_Prudent"),
        ("07_Results_APT_Central", "APT_Central"),
        ("08_Results_APT_Optimistic", "APT_Optimistic"),
        ("09_Results_Historical_Raw", "Historical_Raw"),
    ]:
        scenario_runs[scenario]["model_results_df"].to_excel(writer, sheet_name=sheet, index=False)
    All_Weights.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="10_Weights_By_Model", index=False)
    Weights_By_Class.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="11_Weights_By_Class", index=False)
    Efficient_Frontier.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="12_Efficient_Frontier", index=False)
    All_Monte_Carlo.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="13_Monte_Carlo", index=False)
    All_Backtest.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="14_Backtest_Worst_10_Days", index=False)
    All_Stress.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="15_Stress_Tests", index=False)
    pd.concat([All_Risk_Contributions.assign(Table="Asset_Risk_Contribution"), All_Factor_Risk.assign(Table="Factor_Risk_Contribution")], ignore_index=True, sort=False).to_excel(writer, sheet_name="16_Risk_Contributions", index=False)
    All_Pareto.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="17_Pareto_Filter", index=False)
    All_Scoring.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="18_Final_Scoring", index=False)
    Final_Comparison.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="19_Recommended_Portfolio", index=False)
    pd.concat([Conclusion_Table, Final_Control.rename(columns={"Control": "Point", "Status": "Status", "Comment": "Comment"})], ignore_index=True, sort=False).to_excel(writer, sheet_name="20_Conclusion", index=False)
    Add10MD_Hypotheses.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="21_Add10MD_Hypotheses", index=False)
    Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="22_Add10MD_Results_By_Scenario", index=False)
    Add10MD_Allocation_By_Asset.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="23_Add10MD_Allocation_By_Asset", index=False)
    Add10MD_Allocation_By_Class.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="24_Add10MD_Allocation_By_Class", index=False)
    Add10MD_Impact_Optimizable.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="25_Add10MD_Impact_Optimizable", index=False)
    Add10MD_Impact_Total_Proxy.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="26_Add10MD_Impact_Total_Proxy", index=False)
    Add10MD_Target_Gap.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="27_Add10MD_Target_Gap", index=False)
    Add10MD_Regulatory_Check.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="28_Add10MD_Regulatory_Check", index=False)
    Add10MD_Final_Recommendation.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="29_Add10MD_Final_Recommendation", index=False)

Export_Check = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"Export": "Excel", "Path": str(EXCEL_PATH.relative_to(PROJECT_DIR)), "Exists": EXCEL_PATH.exists()},
        {"Export": "Figures HTML", "Path": str(FIGURES_DIR.relative_to(PROJECT_DIR)), "Exists": FIGURES_DIR.exists()},
        {"Export": "Capital social template", "Path": str(Capital_Social_Template_Path.relative_to(PROJECT_DIR)), "Exists": Capital_Social_Template_Path.exists()},
        {"Export": "Nombre figures visibles", "Path": len(VISIBLE_FIGURES), "Exists": len(VISIBLE_FIGURES) <= 19},
    ]
)
display(Export_Check)
Control Status Comment
0 4 scénarios présents PASSED APT_Central, APT_Optimistic, APT_Prudent, Hist...
1 Historical_Raw présent PASSED Scénario comparatif historique.
2 Objectif d'optimisation par ratio de Sharpe ab... PASSED Le ratio peut rester descriptif, jamais objectif.
3 Benchmark externe interdit absent PASSED Aucune dépendance externe de benchmark n'est u...
4 Frontière efficiente valide PASSED Points valides: 498.
5 Contrainte capital social documentée PASSED_WITH_WARNING Shares_Outstanding manquante ; contrainte docu...
6 Backtesting top 10 pires séances présent PASSED Lignes: 10.
7 Stress tests présents PASSED Scénarios stress: 9.
8 Graphiques autorisés seulement PASSED Figures visibles: 19 (dont 7 figures Add10MD).
9 Exports générés PASSED Excel et HTML exportés.
10 Recommandation non basée sur Historical_Raw PASSED Scénario recommandé: APT_Central.
11 Recommandation non basée uniquement sur Max_Re... PASSED Modèle recommandé: Robust_CVaR_Conservative_Pr...
12 Allocation 10 MD intégrée PASSED Section finale ajoutée au notebook 02.
13 Optimisation 10 MD sur 4 scénarios PASSED APT_Prudent, APT_Central, APT_Optimistic, Hist...
14 APT_Central utilisé comme référence Add10MD PASSED Add10MD_Diversified_Markowitz_Mean_Variance
15 Historical_Raw comparatif uniquement Add10MD PASSED Historical_Raw non recommandé.
16 10 MD investis uniquement dans poche optimisable PASSED Sommes contrôlées par scénario et modèle.
17 Contraintes vérifiées sur portefeuille final PASSED Poids finaux et capital social traités.
18 Rendement total Add10MD nommé proxy modélisé PASSED R_TOTAL_MODELLED_PROXY_FINAL.
19 Pas de rendement requis négatif Add10MD PASSED Cible déjà atteinte affichée séparément.
20 Exports 10 MD générés PASSED Feuilles 21-29 et figures Add10MD.
21 ROE = TSR + 4 % utilisé PASSED Cible: 11.64%.
22 Add10MD_Target_Seeking présent PASSED Variante centrée sur la cible ROE.
23 Add10MD_Diversified présent PASSED Variante prudente de comparaison.
24 Concentration mesurée non bloquante PASSED La concentration est commentée, pas exclue aut...
25 Contraintes réglementaires bloquantes respectées PASSED_WITH_WARNING Regulatory=PASSED, Capital=NON_TESTABLE_DATA_M...
26 Technical_Status PASSED Contrôles techniques principaux.
27 Financial_Status PASSED_WITH_WARNINGS PASSED_WITH_WARNINGS si certaines contraintes ...
Export Path Exists
0 Excel exports\notebook_02_optimisation_resultats.xlsx True
1 Figures HTML exports\figures\notebook_02 True
2 Capital social template data\raw\capital_social_reference_template.csv True
3 Nombre figures visibles 19 True

16. Conclusion opérationnelle¶

Le notebook 02 applique les modèles d'optimisation à quatre scénarios de rendement attendu. Les scénarios APT prudent, central et optimiste représentent des hypothèses prospectives fondées sur les facteurs de risque, tandis que le scénario Historical_Raw sert de comparaison historique.

La recommandation finale reste fondée sur le scénario APT_Central et sur un scoring multicritère intégrant rendement, CVaR, volatilité, concentration, turnover, contraintes réglementaires, stress tests et backtesting des pires séances. Markowitz_Max_Return est conservé comme borne supérieure agressive, mais il n'est pas une recommandation automatique. Le scénario Historical_Raw peut produire des résultats plus favorables, mais il reste descriptif et ne remplace pas les scénarios APT.

La contrainte sur le capital social de l'émetteur est traitée comme non testable lorsque le nombre total d'actions composant le capital social n'est pas disponible. Elle ne doit jamais être considérée comme satisfaite sans donnée externe documentée.

L'allocation additionnelle de 10 MD est analysée avec deux lectures complémentaires. Add10MD_Target_Seeking cherche d'abord à se rapprocher de l'objectif ROE = TSR + 4 %, même si cela conduit à une allocation plus concentrée. Cette concentration n'est pas automatiquement une erreur ; elle signale une allocation plus agressive qui doit être comparée à Add10MD_Diversified, variante plus prudente limitant la concentration du nouveau budget.

Les métriques Add10MD sont toujours recalculées sur le portefeuille final après ajout des 10 MD. Si la cible n'est pas atteinte, le statut reste ANALYSIS_VALID_TARGET_NOT_REACHED : cela traduit une limite économique de l'enveloppe additionnelle, pas une erreur technique.
